CVE-2019-12422.title: Apache Shiro before 1.4.2, when using the default "remember me" c ...
CVE-2019-12422.summary: Apache Shiro before 1.4.2, when using the default "remember me" configuration, cookies could be susceptible to a padding attack.

CVE-2020-11989.title: Apache Shiro before 1.5.3, when using Apache Shiro with Spring dy ...
CVE-2020-11989.summary: Apache Shiro before 1.5.3, when using Apache Shiro with Spring dynamic controllers, a specially crafted request may cause an authentication bypass.

CVE-2020-13933.title: Apache Shiro before 1.6.0, when using Apache Shiro, a specially c ...
CVE-2020-13933.summary: Apache Shiro before 1.6.0, when using Apache Shiro, a specially crafted HTTP request may cause an authentication bypass.

CVE-2020-17510.title: Apache Shiro before 1.7.0, when using Apache Shiro with Spring, a ...
CVE-2020-17510.summary: Apache Shiro before 1.7.0, when using Apache Shiro with Spring, a specially crafted HTTP request may cause an authentication bypass.

CVE-2020-1957.title: Apache Shiro before 1.5.2, when using Apache Shiro with Spring dy ...
CVE-2020-1957.summary: Apache Shiro before 1.5.2, when using Apache Shiro with Spring dynamic controllers, a specially crafted request may cause an authentication bypass.

CVE-2022-32532.title: Apache Shiro before 1.9.1, A RegexRequestMatcher can be misconfig ...
CVE-2022-32532.summary: Apache Shiro before 1.9.1, A RegexRequestMatcher can be misconfigured to be bypassed on some servlet containers. Applications using RegExPatternMatcher with `.` in the regular expression are possibly vulnerable to an authorization bypass.

CVE-2022-40664.title: Apache Shiro before 1.10.0, Authentication Bypass Vulnerability i ...
CVE-2022-40664.summary: Apache Shiro before 1.10.0, Authentication Bypass Vulnerability in Shiro when forwarding or including via RequestDispatcher.

CVE-2023-34478.title: Apache Shiro, before 1.12.0 or 2.0.0-alpha-3, may be susceptible  ...
CVE-2023-34478.summary:
Apache Shiro, before 1.12.0 or 2.0.0-alpha-3, may be susceptible to a path traversal attack that results in an authentication bypass when used together with APIs or other web frameworks that route requests based on non-normalized requests.

Mitigation: Update to Apache Shiro 1.12.0+ or 2.0.0-alpha-3+

CVE-2023-46749.title: Apache Shiro before 1.13.0 or 2.0.0-alpha-4, may be susceptible t ...
CVE-2023-46749.summary:
Apache Shiro before 1.13.0 or 2.0.0-alpha-4, may be susceptible to a path traversal attack that results in an authentication bypass when used together with path rewriting 

Mitigation: Update to Apache Shiro 1.13.0+ or 2.0.0-alpha-4+, or ensure `blockSemicolon` is enabled (this is the default).

CVE-2023-46750.title: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect') vulnerability ...
CVE-2023-46750.summary:
URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect') vulnerability when "form" authentication is used in Apache Shiro.
Mitigation: Update to Apache Shiro 1.13.0+ or 2.0.0-alpha-4+.
